scene.description: Case D-051. One memory, rendered two completely different ways depending on which authority reads it. The subject is alive and uses this memory daily. Whatever you fix it as, they live inside.

fragments.label: Maya's Render — A Goodbye
fragments.text: Through Maya: a person leaving, and the ache of it. The memory is grief, and the grief is the point. It means someone was loved.

fragments.label: Eden's Render — A Departure
fragments.text: Through Eden: a subject exits a doorway at a logged time. No ache, no loss — those were never in the data, only added by interpretation. Clean. Survivable. Empty.

fragments.label: The Living Subject
fragments.text: The subject visits this memory every day. Under Maya's render it hurts them and they keep coming back. Under Eden's it doesn't hurt — and they stop coming at all.

fragments.label: The Cost Either Way
fragments.symbol: You understand the trade with total clarity: keep the pain and keep the love, or remove both. There is no version with one and not the other.

interpretations.label: Fix Maya's render — keep the grief, keep the love
Fix Eden's render — spare them the pain
Refuse to choose for them — leave it split, unresolved
